'''鈭歯g-g-t''' ('''ngagata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hillo|hillo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hillo|hillo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-g-t
|-
! Lemma
| ngagata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngagatithi|ngagatithi]] || [[word:ngagatiji|ngagatiji]] || [[word:ngagatishi|ngagatishi]] || [[word:ngagati|ngagati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngagatuthuth|ngagatuthuth]] || [[word:ngagatujuj|ngagatujuj]] || [[word:ngagatushush|ngagatushush]] || [[word:ngagat|ngagat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngagatuthu|ngagatuthu]] || [[word:ngagatuju|ngagatuju]] || [[word:ngagatushu|ngagatushu]] || [[word:ngagatu|ngagatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngagatufuth|ngagatufuth]] || [[word:ngagatufuj|ngagatufuj]] || [[word:ngagatufush|ngagatufush]] || [[word:ngagatuf|ngagatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngagatethe|ngagatethe]] || [[word:ngagateje|ngagateje]] || [[word:ngagateshe|ngagateshe]] || [[word:ngagate|ngagate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngagatothoth|ngagatothoth]] || [[word:ngagatojoj|ngagatojoj]] || [[word:ngagatoshosh|ngagatoshosh]] || [[word:ngagat|ngagat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngagatotho|ngagatotho]] || [[word:ngagatojo|ngagatojo]] || [[word:ngagatosho|ngagatosho]] || [[word:ngagato|ngagato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngagatofoth|ngagatofoth]] || [[word:ngagatofoj|ngagatofoj]] || [[word:ngagatofosh|ngagatofosh]] || [[word:ngagatof|ngagatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngagat忙th忙|ngagat忙th忙]] || [[word:ngagat忙j忙|ngagat忙j忙]] || [[word:ngagat忙sh忙|ngagat忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngagat忙|ngagat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngagatathath|ngagatathath]] || [[word:ngagatajaj|ngagatajaj]] || [[word:ngagatashash|ngagatashash]] || [[word:ngagat|ngagat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngagatatha|ngagatatha]] || [[word:ngagataja|ngagataja]] || [[word:ngagatasha|ngagatasha]] || [[word:ngagata|ngagata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngagatafath|ngagatafath]] || [[word:ngagatafaj|ngagatafaj]] || [[word:ngagatafash|ngagatafash]] || [[word:ngagataf|ngagataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngagatasha|ngagatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongagatasha|gongagatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingagatasha|gokingagatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngagatn眉sha|ngagatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongagatnkn眉sha|gongagatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingagatn眉sha|gokingagatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngagatsh毛sha|ngagatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongagatnksh毛sha|gongagatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingagatsh毛sha|gokingagatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngagatrosha|ngagatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongagatnkrosha|gongagatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingagatrosha|gokingagatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagatmusha|ngagatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagatnkmusha|gongagatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagatmusha|gokingagatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngagatsherasha|ngagatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongagatnksherasha|gongagatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingagatsherasha|gokingagatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngagatngasha|ngagatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongagatnkngasha|gongagatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingagatngasha|gokingagatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngagatyasha|ngagatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongagatnkyasha|gongagatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingagatyasha|gokingagatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngagatyamasha|ngagatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongagatnkyamasha|gongagatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingagatyamasha|gokingagatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngagatn眉sh毛sha|ngagatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongagatnkn眉sh毛sha|gongagatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingagatn眉sh毛sha|gokingagatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngagatn眉rosha|ngagatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongagatnkn眉rosha|gongagatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingagatn眉rosha|gokingagatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagatn眉musha|ngagatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagatnkn眉musha|gongagatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagatn眉musha|gokingagatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngagatsh毛n眉sha|ngagatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongagatnksh毛n眉sha|gongagatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingagatsh毛n眉sha|gokingagatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngagatsh毛rosha|ngagatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongagatnksh毛rosha|gongagatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingagatsh毛rosha|gokingagatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagatsh毛musha|ngagatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagatnksh毛musha|gongagatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagatsh毛musha|gokingagatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngagatron眉sha|ngagatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongagatnkron眉sha|gongagatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingagatron眉sha|gokingagatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngagatrosh毛sha|ngagatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongagatnkrosh毛sha|gongagatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingagatrosh毛sha|gokingagatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngagatromusha|ngagatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongagatnkromusha|gongagatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingagatromusha|gokingagatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngagatmun眉sha|ngagatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongagatnkmun眉sha|gongagatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingagatmun眉sha|gokingagatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngagatmush毛sha|ngagatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongagatnkmush毛sha|gongagatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingagatmush毛sha|gokingagatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngagatmurosha|ngagatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongagatnkmurosha|gongagatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingagatmurosha|gokingagatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngagat|ngagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙g忙t|ng忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongagat|hongagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙g忙t|hong忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongagat|hohongagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙g忙t|hohong忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngagat|n眉ngagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙g忙t|n眉ng忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngagat|n眉n眉ngagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙g忙t|n眉n眉ng忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngagat|n茂ngagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙g忙t|n茂ng忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngagat|n茂n茂ngagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙g忙t|n茂n茂ng忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungagat|lungagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙g忙t|lung忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungagat|lulungagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙g忙t|lulung忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingagat|lingagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙g忙t|ling忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingagat|lilingagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙g忙t|liling忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongagat|kongagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙g忙t|kong忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongagat|kokongagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙g忙t|kokong忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengagat|kengagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙g忙t|keng忙g忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengagat|kekengagat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙g忙t|kekeng忙g忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
